raw_text:
| Focus             | Type       | ID     | Pre-Condition             | Scenario                        | Test Steps                      | Expected Result                | Result  | Notes / Issue |
| ----------------- | ---------- | ------ | ------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------- | ------------------------------ | ------- | ------------- |
| Login Module      | Functional | TC-001 | User registered           | Verify successful login         | Input valid username & password | User logged in successfully    | Pending |               |
| Login Module      | Negative   | TC-002 | Login page accessible     | Verify invalid password         | Input wrong password            | Error message displayed        | Pending |               |
| Login Module      | Negative   | TC-003 | Login page accessible     | Verify empty username           | Leave username blank            | Validation displayed           | Pending |               |
| Login Module      | Negative   | TC-004 | Login page accessible     | Verify empty password           | Leave password blank            | Validation displayed           | Pending |               |
| Dashboard         | Functional | TC-005 | User logged in            | Verify dashboard loaded         | Open dashboard page             | Dashboard displayed correctly  | Pending |               |
| Dashboard         | Functional | TC-006 | User logged in            | Verify widget visibility        | Check dashboard widgets         | Widgets displayed properly     | Pending |               |
| Client Management | Functional | TC-007 | User logged in            | Verify add client               | Click add client and save       | Client created successfully    | Pending |               |
| Client Management | Functional | TC-008 | Existing client available | Verify edit client              | Update client data              | Client updated successfully    | Pending |               |
| Client Management | Functional | TC-009 | Existing client available | Verify delete client            | Delete selected client          | Client removed successfully    | Pending |               |
| Client Management | Negative   | TC-010 | Add client form open      | Verify mandatory validation     | Leave mandatory field empty     | Validation message shown       | Pending |               |
| API Service       | Functional | TC-011 | API active                | Verify API response             | Send valid request              | API returns 200 response       | Pending |               |
| API Service       | Negative   | TC-012 | API active                | Verify invalid payload          | Send invalid request            | API returns error response     | Pending |               |
| API Service       | Functional | TC-013 | API active                | Verify response structure       | Send request                    | Response matches schema        | Pending |               |
| API Service       | Functional | TC-014 | API active                | Verify authorization token      | Send valid token                | Request authorized             | Pending |               |
| API Service       | Negative   | TC-015 | API active                | Verify expired token            | Send expired token              | Unauthorized response returned | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-016 | Report page accessible    | Verify report load              | Open report page                | Report displayed correctly     | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-017 | Report data exists        | Verify filter by date           | Select date filter              | Filtered data displayed        | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-018 | Report data exists        | Verify filter by client         | Search client name              | Correct data displayed         | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-019 | Report data exists        | Verify sorting ascending        | Click table header              | Data sorted ascending          | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-020 | Report data exists        | Verify sorting descending       | Click table header twice        | Data sorted descending         | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-021 | Report data exists        | Verify pagination               | Navigate next page              | Next page displayed            | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-022 | Report data exists        | Verify export Excel             | Click export Excel              | Excel downloaded               | Pending |               |
| Report Module     | Functional | TC-023 | Report data exists        | Verify export PDF               | Click export PDF                | PDF downloaded                 | Pending |               |
| Security          | Functional | TC-024 | User logged in            | Verify session timeout          | Leave app idle                  | Session expired automatically  | Pending |               |
| Security          | Negative   | TC-025 | Form accessible           | Verify SQL injection prevention | Input SQL query                 | Input blocked                  | Pending |               |
| Security          | Negative   | TC-026 | Form accessible           | Verify XSS prevention           | Input script tag                | Script not executed            | Pending |               |
| UI Testing        | Functional | TC-027 | Application accessible    | Verify responsive layout        | Open in mobile size             | Layout responsive              | Pending |               |
| UI Testing        | Functional | TC-028 | Application accessible    | Verify button alignment         | Open page                       | Buttons aligned correctly      | Pending |               |
| UI Testing        | Functional | TC-029 | Application accessible    | Verify table display            | Open table page                 | Table displayed properly       | Pending |               |
| UI Testing        | Functional | TC-030 | Application accessible    | Verify loading spinner          | Trigger loading process         | Spinner displayed              | Pending |               |
| Notification      | Functional | TC-031 | Notification enabled      | Verify success notification     | Save data                       | Success notification displayed | Pending |               |
| Notification      | Functional | TC-032 | Notification enabled      | Verify error notification       | Trigger failed process          | Error notification displayed   | Pending |               |
| Notification      | Functional | TC-033 | Notification enabled      | Verify warning notification     | Trigger warning                 | Warning displayed              | Pending |               |
| Database          | Functional | TC-034 | DB connected              | Verify data inserted            | Save new data                   | Data stored in DB              | Pending |               |
| Database          | Functional | TC-035 | DB connected              | Verify data updated             | Edit data                       | Data updated in DB             | Pending |               |
| Database          | Functional | TC-036 | DB connected              | Verify data deleted             | Delete data                     | Data removed from DB           | Pending |               |
| Performance       | Functional | TC-037 | System active             | Verify report performance       | Load large report               | Report loads within SLA        | Pending |               |
| Performance       | Functional | TC-038 | System active             | Verify concurrent requests      | Send multiple requests          | System stable                  | Pending |               |
| Compatibility     | Functional | TC-039 | Browser installed         | Verify Chrome compatibility     | Open app in Chrome              | App works correctly            | Pending |               |
| Compatibility     | Functional | TC-040 | Browser installed         | Verify Firefox compatibility    | Open app in Firefox             | App works correctly            | Pending |               |
